evals.prompt: Write me a LinkedIn post announcing that our AI agent platform now runs fully in your own repo.
evals.expected_output: Should read /product-marketing.md for context (and internal-comms for voice/terminology) before writing, asking only for anything genuinely missing like the goal or target action. Should produce one LinkedIn post built as one hook + one idea + one action: a strong first line before the 'see more' fold, line breaks for readability, ~1,200-1,500 chars, no link in the body (link in first comment instead), and a single clear CTA. Should not pack multiple ideas into the post.
assertions: Leads with a hook before the fold
Keeps links out of the post body

evals.prompt: We just published a 40-minute podcast episode. Repurpose it into social content for the next two weeks.
evals.expected_output: Should enter Repurpose mode. Should extract 5-10 self-contained content atoms (quotable claims, mini-stories, tactical tips, contrarian takes, data callouts) and adapt each to a native format across platforms (short clips/Reels/TikTok, LinkedIn posts, an X thread, a carousel). Should write standalone captions that work without the source, spread the posts across 1-2 weeks rather than dumping them, and hand any visual/carousel/cover production to kortix-image rather than describing pixels.
assertions: Extracts multiple content atoms from the source
Adapts each atom to a platform-native format

evals.prompt: script a reel hook for a feature demo, like 30 seconds
evals.expected_output: Should trigger on casual phrasing and enter Video mode. Should apply the 3-second rule (visual + verbal + text-overlay hook landing immediately, payoff shown first, not built up to), pick a structure (e.g. Problem-Solution or Tutorial showing the result first), and output a timestamped script (hook / body / CTA) with production notes. Should note 9:16 and on-screen captions for mute viewing, and hand any cover frame to kortix-image.
assertions: Applies the 3-second rule with all three hook layers
Outputs a timestamped script with a CTA
Notes 9:16 and captions for mute viewing

evals.prompt: what should I post this week? I'm out of ideas. We're a dev-tools startup.
evals.expected_output: Should enter Ideate/Plan mode rather than producing a blank-page brainstorm. Should generate ideas from content pillars (industry insight, behind-the-scenes/build-in-public, educational, personal/opinion, light promo), and for each idea name the pillar, platform, and hook. May offer a weekly grid and a batching plan. Should read existing product-marketing context first if available.
assertions: Generates ideas from content pillars, not a blank page
Names pillar, platform, and hook per idea
